Made in Europe · Handpainted

The Seven Elements

All Collections

Each collection is named after a natural element and designed to cultivate a specific energy in your space. All patterns are hand-painted and made to order.

Fire · Light · Energy

Solara — Golden Light

Feng Shui: South walls · Yang energy

Mediterranean sun channelled through hand-applied ochre and terracotta pigments. Designed for lobbies, dining rooms, and spaces of welcome and vitality.

€420–540/m²

Water · Calm · Wellness

Undara — Still Waters

Feng Shui: North walls · Yin energy

Layered waves in teal and celadon, painted wet-on-wet to create depth and movement. Ideal for spas, treatment rooms, and bedroom sanctuaries.

€460–560/m²

Earth · Architecture · Grounding

Terrae — Foundation

Feng Shui: Centre / SW walls · Stability

Geometric earth forms — sand, sienna, and umber — arranged with architectural precision. Grounds any interior, from minimalist homes to historical villas.

€340–440/m²

Moon · Cycles · Feminine

Lunara — Night Sky

Feng Shui: West / NW walls · Metal

Deep indigo and violet grounds, with pale lunar crescents hand-rendered in silver-white pigment. For master suites, meditation rooms, and intimate spaces.

€500–600/m²

Air · Breath · Minimalism

Aeris — White Breath

Feng Shui: West / NW walls · Clarity

The most restrained of the collections. Barely visible lines and circular forms in chalk and pale sage. For contemporary interiors that prize silence.

€300–380/m²

Fire · Intensity · Ritual

Ignis — Ember Glow

Feng Shui: South walls · Intense Yang

Dark grounds alive with flame forms in amber, sienna, and pale gold. Dramatic and transformative — conceived for feature walls, bars, and ceremonial spaces.

€500–600/m²

Wood · Nature · Growth

Herbae — Botanical Garden

Feng Shui: East / SE walls · Wood energy

The most narrative of the collections. Dense botanical forms — leaves, fronds, stems — painted in layered sage, hunter green, and pale celadon. Transforms a wall into a living garden. Perfect for dining rooms, conservatories, and wellness interiors.

€440–560/m²

Before You Decide

Request a sample panel

We send hand-painted sample panels (30×30cm) of any pattern so you can experience the texture, colour, and energy of the work in your actual space before committing.

Request a Sample
